title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform
The lobster way

title: obra/superpowers

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud

title: We charge $10k a week to delete AI-generated code
content: Article URL: https://odra.dev/slopfix/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48823359 Points: 274 # Comments: 174
summary: 一家公司以每周1万美元的价格提供删除AI生成代码的服务，引发关于AI代码质量和维护成本的讨论。
highlights: We charge $10k a week to delete AI-generated code
AI-generated code often introduces technical debt and maintenance challenges

title: GLM 5.2 and the coming AI margin collapse
content: Article URL: https://martinalderson.com/posts/the-upcoming-ai-margin-collapse-part-1-glm-5-2/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48809877 Points: 671 # Comments: 455
summary: 文章探讨了GLM 5.2模型发布对AI行业的影响，预测AI利润率将因模型商品化和竞争加剧而崩溃。
highlights: GLM 5.2 marks a turning point in AI model commoditization.
The margin collapse is inevitable as open-source alternatives catch up.
Profit margins for proprietary AI models are expected to shrink dramatically.

title: A global workspace in language models

title: Google’s exponential path to climate-wrecking digital bloat
summary: 文章探讨谷歌因指数级增长的数字服务（如搜索、广告、云存储等）导致能源消耗剧增，进而加剧气候危机的路径，并批评其缺乏可持续性措施。
highlights: Google's exponential growth in digital services is driving massive energy consumption.
The company's path is described as 'climate-wrecking' due to lack of sustainable practices.
The article criticizes the environmental impact of data centers and AI expansion.

title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex

highlights: Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity.
AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.

title: Hugging Face Models on Foundry Managed Compute
summary: 本文介绍了如何在Microsoft Foundry托管计算平台上部署和使用Hugging Face模型，包括模型选择、配置步骤和性能优化建议。
highlights: Foundry Managed Compute 支持 Hugging Face 模型的快速部署。
用户可以通过简单的配置在托管环境中运行大规模模型。
文章提供了详细的步骤和最佳实践以优化模型性能。
